title: 21 German Research Institutions Join Zero-X Network
author: Clemens Grosjean
excerpt: Outreach campaign connects with leading German research institutions for Horizon Europe collaboration and thermochemical waste conversion advancement.
content:
Zero-X Group is pleased to announce the successful completion of our German research outreach campaign, establishing connections with 21 leading research institutions across Germany.

Institutions Contacted:
- Fraunhofer UMSICHT (Oberhausen)
- Fraunhofer IKTS Dresden
- Fraunhofer ISE Freiburg
- Fraunhofer ISI Karlsruhe
- DLR Stuttgart
- DBFZ Leipzig
- RWTH Aachen
- KIT Karlsruhe
- TU Berlin
- TUM Munich

Focus Areas:
- Horizon Europe Cluster 5 and 6
- National funding programs (BMBF, BMWK)
- Joint research publications

The campaign emphasized our validated Project Cométha results (1,000+ operating hours) and ongoing Project Verkoso SOFC integration work.
